title: Clockwork Conservatory
synopsis: A botanical mystery source used to prove the world compiler can turn non-anime, non-skyport material into a playable slice. Caretakers in a clockwork greenhouse must restore ward keys, repair a glass gear, and expose sabotage before the moon bridge seals.

locations.name: Atrium Gate
locations.description: A brass-framed greenhouse entrance where ward bells count every visitor.

locations.name: Gear Hall
locations.description: A warm room of slow clockwork vines and missing access keys.

locations.name: Spore Library
locations.description: Tall shelves of seed ledgers under blue mushroom lamps.

locations.name: Inspector Desk
locations.description: A narrow desk where caretakers compare bridge logs.

locations.name: Moon Bridge
locations.description: A glass bridge above the night pond, now marked by scratched ward runes.

locations.name: Root Engine
locations.description: A low machinery pit where roots pull power through ticking pistons.

characters.name: Eda
characters.description: A precise gardener trying to keep the public wards open.
goals: recover the verdigris key before the atrium locks
memories: The verdigris key vanished after the Gear Hall bells rang twice.

characters.name: Brin
characters.description: A patient mechanic who needs a glass gear to restart the ward clock.
goals: recover a glass gear from the Root Engine
memories: A glass gear dropped into the Root Engine during the staged bridge alarm.

characters.name: Sal
characters.description: An archivist who will accuse no one without physical proof.
goals: collect the luminous shell from the Moon Bridge
memories: A luminous shell was scratched beside the Moon Bridge ward runes.

characters.name: Merrow
characters.description: A quiet keeper who hears when the bridge seals before the pond tide shifts.
memories: The tide is normal; the bridge alarm sounds planted.

characters.name: Cale
characters.description: A smiling saboteur forging bridge logs to steal rare cuttings.
goals: seal the Moon Bridge before proof reaches the Inspector Desk
move rare cuttings through the Root Engine
secrets: Cale scratched the false ward runes on the Moon Bridge.
memories: False ward runes work best when caretakers fear the bridge first.

conflicts.title: A forged ward alarm threatens the moon bridge
conflicts.objective: Seal the Moon Bridge with forged ward runes before the ledger proof is gathered.
conflicts.clue: Fresh pink grafting tape on the ward rune points back toward the Atrium Gate.

artifacts.name: Verdigris key
artifacts.description: A green brass key that keeps the atrium wards open.
artifacts.clue: The key slid beneath the second bell housing.

artifacts.name: Glass gear
artifacts.description: A transparent gear needed to restart the ward clock.
artifacts.clue: The gear fell during the staged bridge alarm.

artifacts.name: Luminous shell
artifacts.description: A pond shell scratched with false ward marks.
artifacts.clue: The shell still glows beside the false rune.

artifacts.name: Ink map
artifacts.description: A paper map showing root-tunnel escape paths.
artifacts.clue: The map redirects rare cuttings away from the wardens.

artifacts.name: Signal lantern
artifacts.description: A signal lantern used to confirm bridge closures.
artifacts.clue: The lantern needs proof before sealing the bridge.
